title: Example calculation: dimensional regularization at two-loop
description: In this manuscript I carry out a two-loop calculation in scalar $\phi^3$ that I did as homework at some point. The calculation is a good example of loop calculations in quantum field theory, as well as a nice demonstration of dimensional regularization and integration-by-parts identities (IBPs).

title: Custodial symmetry
description: Custodial symmetry is one of the concepts within the Standard Model that I personally struggled with, especially given that most pedagogical treatments in the literature are somewhat lacking. This script goes over the concept, carefully explains the group theory aspects and carries out some of the calculations.

title: Quantum Corrections to the Kink Mass
description: Kinks are $1+1$ dimensional classical solutions which can act as saddles in the path integral. They have a classical mass which is modified by quantum corrections of the kink background interacting with excitations around the saddle. In this note I fill in the details of the computations of this correction that is presented ir Eric Weinberg's book on classical solutions. This computation is surprisingly non-trivial and contains many insights on quantum field theory, quantum mechanics and non-perturbative computations.
